_doc: Agent A prep for owner's 4-gate test (10->50->500->1000). Owner approved OPT-3 depth, torch-GPU, AP->TP ASR. Statuses ⬜🔄✅⛔.

prep.note: --persist-depth-maps flag (default off): maps transient for shot_quality/frames_composition, not persisted. 11x disk. Owner approved if full maps don't add quality (they don't for models; consumers get maps in-run).
prep.result: Validated on pod: depth NPZ 151MB->9.3MB (16x), rc=0, schema depth_maps/norm made optional. Per-video ~159->17MB.

prep.note: torch cu121 (driver 550=CUDA12.4 compat) or Triton export -> scene + inprocess-torch on GPU. Owner: делай.
prep.result: torch cu121 -> CUDA True on pod driver (550/570). scene GPU 16.8s vs CPU ~101s = ~6x. Implementation = swap venv torch cu130->cu121 + run_corpus --device cuda + validate other components.

prep.note: Wire AP asr_extractor -> doc.asr -> TP. Owner: строй. Unblocks 7 TP components. | DESIGN DONE: asr_extractor outputs Whisper token-IDs (token_ids_by_segment+timings); TP asr_text_proxy decodes tokens transiently. Bridge = NPZ->doc.asr dict->VideoDocument->TP. Buildable, needs full AP pipeline (.ap_venv+Whisper) integrated into run_corpus.
Component list as config (not hardcoded 7) + AP/TP venv support.
apt: ffmpeg time bc libarchive13 python3-numpy. Else Triton fails / metrics break.
For 500/1000 if disk needs it (with OPT-3 maybe not needed). Adapt Fetcher hf_queues.
Run 10/50/500/1000 with gen_report per gate. Raise pod self when ready. | 10-video VP smoke RUNNING (validates OPT-1+OPT-3).
